style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift upward like scattered stardust, each particle refracting soft pastel light. A delicate petal-shaped aura pulses with a pale lavender glow, radiating outward in concentric circles. The lighting mood is a warm, inviting glow of rose quartz, casting gentle reflections on the ground. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
